name: Injured on job by coworker driving company car - sue employer?
description: Yes via vicarious liability if work-related.[1]

mainEntity.name: Injured on job by coworker driving company car - sue employer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes via vicarious liability if work-related.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Vicarious liability if within scope of employment in Utah.[1] Context: Employer liable for employee negligence during duties.[1] Key factors: Course/scope proof via logs, schedules.[1] Practical guidance: Workers comp first, then third-party if extra damages. Evidence key. Consult for dual claims.
